name: PVE LXC Apps Updater
description: Batch-update LXC apps installed by community-scripts or Proxmox Custom Scripts (musicassistant, ha-mcp, newt, and more). Resolves each container's update script from the URL in /usr/bin/update, with optional vzdump backups, unattended mode, and a summary report.

notes.text: Run on the Proxmox host (not inside a container). Detects LXCs tagged community-script or proxmox-helper-scripts.

Unlike upstream update-apps, this script downloads ct/<service>.sh from whichever repo each container's /usr/bin/update points at — so custom apps (musicassistant, ha-mcp, newt) and community-scripts apps update in one pass.

Unattended (all running): `var_backup=no var_container=all_running var_unattended=yes var_skip_confirm=yes bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oraad/proxmox-scripts/main/tools/pve/update-apps.sh)"`
Optional vzdump backup before each update; on failure the script can restore from that backup. Logs: /usr/local/community-scripts/update_apps/
Dry-run (var_dry_run=yes) only reports versions for apps that use check_for_gh_release (e.g. newt). Docker/uvx apps (musicassistant, ha-mcp) are skipped in dry-run.
Per-container update still works: `pct exec <CTID> -- update` or run `update` inside the LXC.
